releaseNotes:
v0.24.1 — Hotfix for Android fresh-install spinner.

Fresh installs of v0.24.0 on Android could hang on the splash CircularProgressIndicator forever. Bootstrap was awaiting flutter_secure_storage and Google Sign-In SDK calls that don't always resolve under Android Keystore / Play Services edge conditions. Each suspect bootstrap step is now timeout-wrapped so the app degrades gracefully (Drive sync skipped, etc.) instead of spinning forever.

All v0.24.0 features are unchanged: Windows .exe installer, Settings menu compression, Save-to-file support bundle, Delete-in-error button, multi-device docs page at https://rxrescue.us/multi-device.
